properties.name: Meeting
properties.description: Root aggregate representing a single meeting being processed. Owns Recording, Transcript, Protocol. Top-level object referenced by all downstream entities.

properties.name: Recording
properties.description: Metadata for the uploaded video file. Tracks filename, size, MIME, object storage path, and optional duration. Physical file in EXT-04.

properties.name: TranscriptionJob
properties.description: Async job tracking the ASR+diarization pipeline for a recording. Used to detect failure and surface error details.

properties.name: Transcript
properties.description: Persisted verbatim speaker-attributed transcript from ASR+diarization. Segments stored inline as structured content rather than separate entities at MVP scope.

properties.name: ProtocolGenerationJob
properties.description: Async job tracking LLM-based protocol generation for a transcript. Created automatically when transcription job completes.

properties.name: Protocol
properties.description: Persisted meeting protocol Markdown produced by LLM and optionally refined by user. Sections: participants, topics, decisions, action items with assignees/deadlines. Version-incremented on each save.
